cmd: K=$(grep -E '^N8N_API_KEY=' /root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env | tail -1 | cut -d= -f2-); if [ -z "$K" ]; then echo NO_KEY_IN_ENV; else code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/wf.json -w '%{http_code}' -m 25 -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: $K" 'https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/workflows?limit=250'); echo "auth HTTP: $code"; python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/wf.json')); ws=d.get('data') if isinstance(d,dict) else d; ws=ws or []; print('count:',len(ws)); [print(('ON ' if w.get('active') else 'off'), w.get('id'), '|', w.get('name')) for w in ws]" 2>/dev/null || head -c 200 /tmp/wf.json; fi
